/opt/altera/qpro/riscfree/toolchain/riscv32-unknown-elf/bin/riscv32-unknown-elf-gcc -g --oslib=libhal2_bsp --specs=picolibcpp.specs -mhal -nostdlib -Wl,--defsym=__heap_end=__alt_heap_limit -Wl,--defsym=__heap_start=__alt_heap_start -march=rv32i -mabi=ilp32 CMakeFiles/app.elf.dir/main.c.obj -o app.elf  -T /altera_examples/altera_learn/proj/2_vds/cmpl_proj/software/bsp/linker.x -nostdlib -Wl,--start-group bsp/libhal2_bsp.a -lc -lstdc++ -lgcc -lm -Wl,--end-group
